violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Silver dorm style refrigerator operating at 43-44 degrees F.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Detail cleaning needed.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. Condiment bottles being re-filled/re-used.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Carpeting was installed as floor covering where not allowed. Carpeting installed where refrigerator and refrigerator storage is located.--Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Unsealed walls in storage area. Styrofoam insulation used in back storage room.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning under equipment. Carpeting in storage room dirty/stained/matted.
